changelog: v4.3 — Make the rebound_boost deep-de-risk cash safe-harbor EXPLICIT (cash_above_def=1.0), replacing an implicit float-boundary accident + a 1% routing-seed hack with a named, tunable lever. BIT-IDENTICAL to v4.2 (behavior unchanged, end-value verified to the dollar; 18.16% / worst-12mo −7.9% / Martin 3.64). The mechanism historically fires in ~1 window (Jan 2009, ~80% to cash) — a single high-leverage GFC-bottom decision, so its edge is n=1. Engine refactor only; no metric change. See engine-differential scenario 25.
